_comment: Test-only telemetry config. Enables the Tracy-style profiler for ProfilerActive==true so TyphonEvent producer tests can exercise the on-path. Concurrency stays off — ConcurrencyTracingStressTests is [Explicit] and requires running with TYPHON__PROFILER__CONCURRENCY__ENABLED=true env var. Checks (strict mode, #422) run suite-wide so the converted user-facing guards actively catch misuse; DeclaredAccess is on so the SystemAccessValidator net is exercised.
